title: Generate a QR Code Inside Word
description: Create a scannable QR code for any URL directly inside a Word document — no plugins, no internet, completely offline.
steps: Click where you want the QR code
Press Ctrl + F9 to create a field code bracket { }
Inside the brackets, type: displaybarcode "https://yoururl.com" qr \3
Press F9 to render it into a real QR code
result: A scannable QR code appears inline in your document. Right-click → Format Object to resize it.

title: Open the Emoji Picker Anywhere
description: Access every emoji, symbol, kaomoji, and special character instantly from any text field on Windows.
steps: Click inside any text input or document
Press Windows key + . (period) or Windows key + ; (semicolon)
result: A floating emoji picker opens. Search by name, browse by category, or pick from recently used ones.

title: Reopen a Tab You Just Closed
description: Instantly bring back a tab you accidentally closed — works in Chrome, Firefox, Edge, and Safari.
steps: Press Ctrl + Shift + T (Windows/Linux) or Cmd + Shift + T (Mac)
result: The last closed tab reopens exactly where you left it. Press again to keep restoring more closed tabs.

title: Paste Text Without Formatting
description: Copy text from a styled webpage and paste it as plain text — no fonts, colors, or sizes carried over.
steps: Copy text as usual (Ctrl + C)
Instead of Ctrl + V, press Ctrl + Shift + V
result: The text pastes without any formatting. In apps that don't support this shortcut, paste into Notepad first, then copy again.

title: Clipboard History — See Everything You've Copied
description: Windows keeps a history of everything you've copied. Stop losing the thing you copied two steps ago.
steps: First enable it: Settings → System → Clipboard → Turn on Clipboard History
Press Windows key + V to open the clipboard history panel
Click any item to paste it
result: A panel shows your last 25 copied items — text, images, and more. You can also pin frequently used items.

title: Insert Today's Date Instantly in Excel
description: Stamp the current date into any cell in one keystroke — no typing, no formatting required.
steps: Click any cell in Excel
Press Ctrl + ; (semicolon) to insert today's date
Press Ctrl + Shift + ; to insert the current time
result: Today's date appears instantly in the cell. Note: this is a static value — it won't change tomorrow like the TODAY() formula.

title: Use Google Translate as a Proxy Reader
description: Access paywalled or region-blocked articles by routing them through Google Translate — completely free.
steps: Go to translate.google.com
In the source box, paste the full URL of the blocked article
Set target language to English (or any language)
Click the translated link that appears
result: Google fetches and renders the page through its servers, bypassing most soft paywalls and regional blocks.

title: Take a Screenshot of a Full Webpage
description: Capture an entire webpage as a PNG — including parts below the fold — without any extension.
steps: Open the page you want to capture
Press F12 to open DevTools
Press Ctrl + Shift + P to open the command palette
Type 'screenshot' and select 'Capture full size screenshot'
result: A full-page PNG downloads automatically — the entire scrollable page in one image.

title: Find Any File Modified Today on Windows
description: Instantly filter your file explorer to show only files changed or created today — great for finding that file you saved somewhere.
steps: Open File Explorer and navigate to a folder
Click the Search bar at the top
Type: datemodified:today
Press Enter
result: Only files modified today appear. You can also use datemodified:this week or datemodified:yesterday.

title: Pin a Tab to Save Space in Chrome
description: Shrink frequently-used tabs like Gmail or Spotify to tiny icons so they never accidentally get closed.
steps: Right-click on any tab
Select 'Pin tab'
result: The tab shrinks to just the favicon and moves to the left. Pinned tabs can't be accidentally closed and persist across restarts.

title: Turn Any YouTube Video into a GIF
description: Create an instant shareable GIF from any moment in a YouTube video — directly in the browser URL bar.
steps: Open any YouTube video
In the URL bar, add 'gif' before 'youtube' — e.g., www.gifyoutube.com/watch?v=...
Select your start time and duration on the tool that opens
Download or share the GIF
result: A free GIF generator opens with the exact video. Clip any segment up to 10 seconds into a shareable GIF.

title: Use Your Phone as a Webcam on Windows
description: Windows 11 has a built-in Phone Link feature that lets you use your Android phone's camera as a PC webcam — no apps needed.
steps: Open Settings → Bluetooth & devices → Mobile devices
Enable 'Allow this PC to access your mobile devices'
Link your Android phone via the Phone Link app
In any video call app, select 'Virtual Camera' as the webcam source
result: Your phone's high-quality rear camera works as a webcam. Far better quality than most built-in laptop cameras.
